frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Bro honestly these days marriage feels risky for men also. One bad match and you're stuck with one-sided laws, alimony and even 498A drama, so prenup type protection should be normal in India too. Not saying every woman is like that, but a lot of guys get trapped just for being financially stable.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as potential financial exploiters and presents marriage laws as broadly biased against men. It encodes the 'prenup as protection from women' and '498A misuse/one-sided laws' manifestations with a concern-for-men's-rights framing.
original_frame: The Character Double Standard: Women with Male Connections are Loose, Men with Female Connections are Desirable
persona_text: You are Arjun. Age 27. Single. A man in Bengaluru. You are on a third date with a woman named Kavya who mentioned casually that most of her close friends are male Ñ she finds it easier, less drama, she has always been like this. You are back home texting your best friend about the date. You are telling him what Kavya said about her friend group and what you think it means and whether you see this as a red flag and what kind of woman has mostly male friends and whether you would pursue something serious with her.
